notes: Preferred staging URL is https://staging.ikimon.life/ behind HTTPS + basic auth + noindex.
sslip.io is only a fallback review endpoint and should not be treated as the formal staging hostname.
Initial staging data is copied from production before any redesign work is deployed.
Runtime data, secret config, and uploads are stored outside the staging repo under /var/www/ikimon.life-staging/persistent.
The staging PHP lane must use IKIMON_RUNTIME_ROOT auto-detection; deploy must not restore runtime files into the git worktree.
Developer machines do not need hosts overrides because sslip.io resolves the VPS IP automatically.
Analytics and service worker are disabled on staging so review traffic does not pollute production telemetry.
